name: Yubel
desc: Cannot be destroyed by battle. You take no battle damage from battles involving this card. Before damage calculation, if this face-up Attack Position card is targeted for an attack: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to that attacking monster's ATK. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Tribute 1 other monster or destroy this card. When this card is destroyed, except by its own effect: Its owner can Special Summon 1 "Yubel - Terror Incarnate" from their hand, Deck, or GY.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
